001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element;
002
003import java.util.Arrays;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.Guithium;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
008
009/**
010 * Represents a gradient filled rectangle element.
011 */
012public class Gradient extends Rect<Gradient> {
013    /**
014     * The default color gradient Minecraft likes to use.
015     */
016    public static final Gradient GRADIENT = Gradient.of(Guithium.MOD_ID + ":gradient")
017            .setColorTop(0xC0101010)
018            .setColorBottom(0xD0101010);
019
020    private final int[] color = new int[]{0, 0, 0, 0};
021
022    /**
023     * Create a new gradient element.
024     *
025     * @param key Unique identifier
026     */
027    public Gradient(@NotNull String key) {
028        this(Key.of(key));
029    }
030
031    /**
032     * Create a new gradient element.
033     *
034     * @param key Unique identifier
035     */
036    public Gradient(@NotNull Key key) {
037        super(key, Type.GRADIENT);
038    }
039
040    /**
041     * Create a new gradient element.
042     *
043     * @param key Unique identifier
044     * @return New gradient element
045     */
046    @NotNull
047    public static Gradient of(@NotNull String key) {
048        return of(Key.of(key));
049    }
050
051    /**
052     * Create a new gradient element.
053     *
054     * @param key Unique identifier
055     * @return New gradient element
056     */
057    @NotNull
058    public static Gradient of(@NotNull Key key) {
059        return new Gradient(key);
060    }
061
062    /**
063     * Get the colors for all four corners.
064     * <p>
065     * Array index starts at top left and iterates counterclockwise.
066     *
067     * @return Array of colors of all four corners
068     */
069    public int[] getColors() {
070        return this.color;
071    }
072
073    /**
074     * Get the top left color.
075     *
076     * @return Top left color
077     */
078    public int getColorTopLeft() {
079        return this.color[0];
080    }
081
082    /**
083     * Set the top left color.
084     *
085     * @param color Color to set
086     * @return This gradient
087     */
088    @NotNull
089    public Gradient setColorTopLeft(int color) {
090        this.color[0] = color;
091        return this;
092    }
093
094    /**
095     * Get the bottom left color.
096     *
097     * @return Bottom left color
098     */
099    public int getColorBottomLeft() {
100        return this.color[1];
101    }
102
103    /**
104     * Set the bottom left color.
105     *
106     * @param color Color to set
107     * @return This gradient
108     */
109    @NotNull
110    public Gradient setColorBottomLeft(int color) {
111        this.color[1] = color;
112        return this;
113    }
114
115    /**
116     * Get the bottom right color.
117     *
118     * @return Bottom right color
119     */
120    public int getColorBottomRight() {
121        return this.color[2];
122    }
123
124    /**
125     * Set the bottom right color.
126     *
127     * @param color Color to set
128     * @return This gradient
129     */
130    @NotNull
131    public Gradient setColorBottomRight(int color) {
132        this.color[2] = color;
133        return this;
134    }
135
136    /**
137     * Get the top right color.
138     *
139     * @return Top right color
140     */
141    public int getColorTopRight() {
142        return this.color[3];
143    }
144
145    /**
146     * Set the top right color.
147     *
148     * @param color Color to set
149     * @return This gradient
150     */
151    @NotNull
152    public Gradient setColorTopRight(int color) {
153        this.color[3] = color;
154        return this;
155    }
156
157    /**
158     * Set both top (left and right) colors.
159     *
160     * @param color Color to set
161     * @return This gradient
162     */
163    @NotNull
164    public Gradient setColorTop(int color) {
165        setColorTopLeft(color);
166        setColorTopRight(color);
167        return this;
168    }
169
170    /**
171     * Set both bottom (left and right) colors.
172     *
173     * @param color Color to set
174     * @return This gradient
175     */
176    @NotNull
177    public Gradient setColorBottom(int color) {
178        setColorBottomLeft(color);
179        setColorBottomRight(color);
180        return this;
181    }
182
183    /**
184     * Set both left (top and bottom) colors.
185     *
186     * @param color Color to set
187     * @return This gradient
188     */
189    @NotNull
190    public Gradient setColorLeft(int color) {
191        setColorTopLeft(color);
192        setColorBottomLeft(color);
193        return this;
194    }
195
196    /**
197     * Set both right (top and bottom) colors.
198     *
199     * @param color Color to set
200     * @return This gradient
201     */
202    @NotNull
203    public Gradient setColorRight(int color) {
204        setColorTopRight(color);
205        setColorBottomRight(color);
206        return this;
207    }
208
209    /**
210     * Set all colors (all four corners) to a single color.
211     *
212     * @param color Color to set
213     * @return This gradient
214     */
215    @NotNull
216    public Gradient setColorAll(int color) {
217        setColorTop(color);
218        setColorBottom(color);
219        return this;
220    }
221
222    @Override
223    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
224        if (!super.equals(obj)) {
225            return false;
226        }
227        Gradient other = (Gradient) obj;
228        return Arrays.equals(getColors(), other.getColors());
229    }
230
231    @Override
232    public int hashCode() {
233        // pacifies codefactor.io
234        return super.hashCode();
235    }
236}
